scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:5000 npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
